system.name: Overpowers Toolkit
system.description: A massive, opinionated toolkit for OpenCode/Claude Code, forked from Superpowers. It serves as a comprehensive 'agent army' and automation framework, significantly expanding the original capabilities with over 960 components.

agents.description: Specialized AI personas defined in Markdown frontmatter.

key_directories.agents/: Source of truth for all agent definitions.
key_directories.config/: Generated JSON configurations for the runtime.

scripting_and_tooling.python_3: Used for configuration generation (generate-agent-configs.py) and complex logic.
scripting_and_tooling.bash_shell: Used for deployment scripts (deploy-agent-army.sh) and skill execution wrappers.

infrastructure.jules_swarm: A submodule (packages/jules-swarm) for distributed task execution across multiple Google accounts.
infrastructure.json: Used for final configuration injection into OpenCode.

ceo_orchestration_loop: Input: User provides a high-level goal.
Decomposition: The CEO agent uses the task_decomposition_expert.
jules_swarm_workflow: Dispatch (jules-dispatch): Generates optimized, modular prompts. Creates a dispatch record in .jules/pending/. Assigns tasks to available Google Jules accounts (round-robin).
Harvest (jules-harvest): Polls for completed tasks. Fetches remote branches created by the swarm.
Triage (jules-triage): Enables parallel review of the harvested branches. Rates solutions.
Integrate (jules-integrate): Merges the approved branches into the main codebase.
compound_product_cycle: Input: Report markdown file in reports/.
Cycle: Generates PRD, executes loop, verifies.
Output: Feature Branch ready for PR.

skills.used_by: Agents to perform specific actions (e.g., 'Web Research', 'Code Analysis')

workflows.describes: A sequence of steps for complex goals.

AGENTS.md.responsibility: Defines Operational Laws, Protocols, and Routing Table.

JULES_ARCHITECTURAL_DIGEST.md.responsibility: High-level system design and critical paths.

generate-agent-configs.py.responsibility: Compiles Markdown agents into CLI-compatible JSON config.

scripts/compound/auto-compound.sh.responsibility: Automates the 'Report -> PRD -> Code -> PR' product lifecycle.

packages/jules-swarm/.responsibility: Python submodule for managing distributed agent swarms via Jules API.

hooks/safety/destructive-command-blocker.responsibility: Prevents catastrophic shell commands (rm -rf /, mkfs, etc.).

generate-inventory.py.responsibility: Generates markdown inventory of all assets (Agents, Skills, Scripts).

deploy-agent-army.sh.responsibility: Master script to regenerate configs and inject them into the runtime.

agents/.responsibility: Source of truth for all 449+ agents.

skills/.responsibility: Source of truth for all 207+ skills.

protocol_zero.rule: Every session MUST start by reading continuity.md and end by updating it.
protocol_zero.purpose: Maintains context across stateless agent sessions.
protocol_zero.action: Read continuity.md -> Align -> Work -> Update continuity.md.

changelog_law.rule: Every code modification MUST have a corresponding entry in CHANGELOG.md.

law_of_explicit_declaration.rule: Agents are not visible to the system until generate-agent-configs.py is run and the config is reloaded.

safety_constraints.secrets: Never commit API keys. Use 1password skill or env vars.
safety_constraints.versioning: Do not change package versions without explicit instruction.

metis.description: Classifies intent and consults before planning.

librarian.description: Finds documentation and examples from external sources.

oracle.description: High-IQ reasoning for complex architecture and debugging.

explorer.description: Internal codebase exploration via grep/AST search.

observations: Scale: massive (449+ agents, 207+ skills), indicating high degree of specialization but potential for fragmentation.
Architecture: separation between 'Definition' (Markdown) and 'Runtime' (JSON/Python) is clean.
Automation: 'Compound Product Cycle' and 'Jules Swarm' indicate high level of self-replication and autonomous capability.
Documentation: extensive and seemingly up-to-date with code structure.
technical_debt: Count Mismatch: README.md and AGENTS.md report outdated counts (~390 agents vs 449 actual, ~149 skills vs 207 actual).
Legacy Paths: generate-inventory.py contains hardcoded paths (/home/sephiroth/...) which may fail in other environments.
Duplication: Some agent definitions (e.g., sisyphus) appear in multiple locations (agents/ vs agents/sisyphus/).
Complexity: Sheer number of files makes manual navigation difficult; reliance on tooling is essential.
